name: Uninsured employer after my work injury - options?

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer after my work injury - options?

acceptedAnswer.description: Utah Uninsured Employers Fund covers if employer lacks insurance.[2] Key factors: (1) Prove no coverage; (2) Same benefits as insured; (3) Fund sues employer; (4) Report violation. File standard claim, notify fund. Attorney accesses fund.
